zh.lifeSummary: 當William Carpenter於1520年8月19日出生在英國賀福爾迪爾時，他的父親John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn24歲，母親Elizabeth Mountfort28歲。他於1536年與Elizabeth Stockham在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1587年10月19日在英國維爾爾瓦明斯特享年67歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾瓦明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Carpenter于1520年8月19日出生在英国賀福爾迪爾时，他的父亲John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn24岁，母亲Elizabeth Mountfort28岁。他于1536年与Elizabeth Stockham在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1587年10月19日在英国維爾爾瓦明斯特享年67岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾瓦明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Carpenter was born on 19 August 1520, in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England, his father, John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Mountfort, was 28. He married Elizabeth Stockham in 1536, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 19 October 1587, in Warminster, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Warminster, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Carpenter est né le 19 août 1520, à Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mountfort, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stockham en 1536, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1587, à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Carpenter am 19. August 1520 in Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mountfort 28. Er hat 1536 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Stockham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1587 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Warminster, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Warminster, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Carpenter è nato il il 19 agosto 1520 nel Dilwyn, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mountfort, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stockham nel 1536, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1587, nel Warminster, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Warminster, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Carpenterが1520年8月19日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアデルウインで生まれた時，父John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwynは24歳，母Elizabeth Mountfortは28歳であった。1536年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでElizabeth Stockhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1587年10月19日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターで67歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Carpenter(이)가 1520년 8월 19일 영국 허퍼드실르 디w이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mountfort(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Elizabeth Stockham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1587년 10월 19일 영국 윌츠히르 워민스터에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 워민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.19 August 1520–19 October 1587: 19 de agosto de 1520–19 de outubro de 1587
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Carpenter nasceu em 19 de agosto de 1520, em Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mountfort, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stockham em 1536, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1587, em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Carpenter родился 19 августа 1520 г. в местности дилвин, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mountfort, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stockham в 1536 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 19 октября 1587 г. в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия.

es.19 August 1520–19 October 1587: 19 de agosto de 1520–19 de octubre de 1587
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Carpenter nació el 19 de agosto de 1520, en Dilwyn, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mountfort, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stockham en 1536, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1587, en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
